languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

languages.text: {n}Великан указывает на массивную глыбу, расположенную на трофейной доске.{/n} "Сие есть свидетельство того, как древние враги моего вида были сражены руками твоего примитивного народа. Известно ли тебе, как появился этот объект и почему он занимает столь почетное место?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Великан указывает на массивную глыбу, расположенную на трофейной доске.{/n} "Сие есть свидетельство того, как древние враги моего вида были сражены руками твоего примитивного народа. Известно ли тебе, как появился этот объект и почему он занимает столь почетное место?"

{n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

languages.text: {n}巨人指向挂在战利品展示墙上的一块巨大方块。{/n}“这是我族的远古敌人被你们这群原始人击败的证明。你知道这物件为何会出现在这里，又为何被陈列在如此尊贵的位置吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

traits.locale_text: {n}巨人指向挂在战利品展示墙上的一块巨大方块。{/n}“这是我族的远古敌人被你们这群原始人击败的证明。你知道这物件为何会出现在这里，又为何被陈列在如此尊贵的位置吗？”

languages.text: {n}El gigante señala un bloque enorme colgado en la vitrina de trofeos.{/n} «Esto es un testamento de la derrota de los enemigos de mi gente a manos de tu pueblo primitivo. ¿Sabes cómo llegó aquí este objeto y por qué ocupa un lugar tan distinguido?».
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El gigante señala un bloque enorme colgado en la vitrina de trofeos.{/n} «Esto es un testamento de la derrota de los enemigos de mi gente a manos de tu pueblo primitivo. ¿Sabes cómo llegó aquí este objeto y por qué ocupa un lugar tan distinguido?».

languages.text: {n}Le géant désigne un bloc massif suspendu au tableau des trophées.{/n} « Ceci témoigne de la manière dont les anciens ennemis de mon peuple ont péri aux mains de votre civilisation primitive. Savez-vous comment cet objet est arrivé ici, et pourquoi 'il occupe une telle place d'honneur ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le géant désigne un bloc massif suspendu au tableau des trophées.{/n} « Ceci témoigne de la manière dont les anciens ennemis de mon peuple ont péri aux mains de votre civilisation primitive. Savez-vous comment cet objet est arrivé ici, et pourquoi 'il occupe une telle place d'honneur ? »

languages.text: {n}Dev adam, ganimet panosunda asılı duran devasa bir bloku işaret ediyor.{/n} "Bu, türümün kadim düşmanlarının senin ilkel halkının ellerinde aldığı mağlubiyetin bir kanıtı. Bu nesnenin buraya nasıl geldiğini ve neden böyle onurlu bir yere sahip olduğunu biliyor musun?"
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Dev adam, ganimet panosunda asılı duran devasa bir bloku işaret ediyor.{/n} "Bu, türümün kadim düşmanlarının senin ilkel halkının ellerinde aldığı mağlubiyetin bir kanıtı. Bu nesnenin buraya nasıl geldiğini ve neden böyle onurlu bir yere sahip olduğunu biliyor musun?"

languages.text: {n}Der Riese deutet auf einen massiven Block an deinem Trophäenregal.{/n} "Das ist ein Beleg, wie die alten Feinde meiner Art durch die Hand deines primitiven Volkes besiegt wurden. Weißt du, wie dieses Objekt hierher gelangt ist und warum es einen solchen Ehrenplatz einnimmt?"
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Riese deutet auf einen massiven Block an deinem Trophäenregal.{/n} "Das ist ein Beleg, wie die alten Feinde meiner Art durch die Hand deines primitiven Volkes besiegt wurden. Weißt du, wie dieses Objekt hierher gelangt ist und warum es einen solchen Ehrenplatz einnimmt?"

languages.text: {n}巨人がトロフィーボードに掛かった巨大な塊を指し示す。{/n}「これは、我が種族の古き敵が、お前たち原始的な民の手によっていかにして打ち破られたかの証だ。この品がなぜここにあり、なぜこれほどの栄誉ある場所を占めているのか、お前は知っているか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"
